query: SELECT id, title, status, LENGTH(abc_notation) as abc_length, SUBSTRING(abc_notation, 1, 200) as abc_start, RIGHT(abc_notation, 200) as abc_end FROM mp3_sheet_jobs WHERE status = 'done' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;
